_schema.description: Reference encyclopedia stat anchors for Evertale stat reconstruction. Standard anchors use Lv80 profile values. Limit-break anchors use Lv100 preview values after entering limit-break progression.

fields.base_hp_lv80: HP shown in encyclopedia standard profile at Lv80
fields.base_atk_lv80: ATK shown in encyclopedia standard profile at Lv80
fields.lb_hp_lv100: HP shown in encyclopedia limit-break preview at Lv100
fields.lb_atk_lv100: ATK shown in encyclopedia limit-break preview at Lv100
fields.source: Where the anchor was collected from
fields.verified: Whether values are manually verified from screenshot/game data
